_comment: CHIPS Copilot MCP server configuration. v1.1 — package names verified against npm registry on 2026-05-28. Fill in API keys / paths for the ones you want to enable. Comment out unused servers.

courtlistener._purpose: Federal and state case law verification. PRIMARY citation verification tool. Free API token from https://www.courtlistener.com/help/api/

gmail._purpose: Retrieve case-related correspondence, draft replies. OAuth on first use; credentials cached to GMAIL_CREDENTIALS_PATH.

filesystem._purpose: Local case-file access scoped to the case directory. Sandboxed to CHIPS_CASE_DIR.

dropbox._purpose: Optional evidence-vault sync. Only enable if you back up case data to Dropbox.

firecrawl._purpose: Web page content extraction for legal research (statutes, court rules, news coverage). Free tier from https://firecrawl.dev

web-fetch._purpose: Generic web fetch returning clean markdown. Alternative to firecrawl; supports YouTube transcripts.

playwright._purpose: Browser automation for court e-filing systems (efile.wicourts.gov, PACER, state-specific e-filing). NEVER SUBMITS without explicit user confirmation.
playwright._safety_note: This server can interact with court systems. The agent must require explicit user confirmation including the filing name and venue before any submission action. .claude/settings.json sets `mcp__playwright__*` to `ask`.

sqlite-case-db._purpose: Optional local SQLite for case database (chronology, witnesses, evidence index).

github._purpose: Optional version control for case directory. Recommended for technical users only — see SECURITY guidance in INSTALL.md before pointing this at a private case repo.
